subcodes.title: Words spoken at 309 W 78th St in New York, 1912-06-12
subcodes.first_line: In the Cause of Baha'u'llah it is obligatory for the individual to engage in a trade or profession. For instance, I know mat weaving and you know another trade... I have already spoken about this matter
subcodes.first_line_orig: در امر بهآءالله بر هر نفسی اشتغال بصنعت و کسبی فرض است مثلاً منه حصیر بافی میدانم و شما صنعت دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @spiritual transformation, @useful occupation; acquisition of a craft; trade; profession, @work as worship
